name: Core
description: The original Positive Phill affirmation collection.

affirmations.text: I am confident in my abilities and trust in my decisions.
I radiate self-assurance and inspire others with my presence.
I believe in myself and embrace every challenge with courage.
My confidence grows stronger with every step I take forward.
I am worthy of success and all the good things life offers.
I trust my intuition and make decisions with clarity.
I am becoming a better version of myself every day.
I stand tall, speak boldly, and own my unique power.
I am at peace with myself and the world around me.
I breathe deeply and release all tension from my body.
Serenity flows through me, calming my mind and soul.
I choose peace over worry, and trust that all is well.
My mind is clear, my heart is light, and I am present.
I release what I cannot control and embrace the moment.
Tranquility surrounds me and fills me with gentle ease.
I am safe, supported, and completely at peace.
I am grateful for the abundance that flows into my life.
Every day brings new blessings I appreciate deeply.
I appreciate the beauty in every moment and every person.
My heart overflows with thankfulness for all I have.
I am blessed beyond measure and recognize my good fortune.
I give thanks for both the big and small joys in life.
Gratitude transforms my perspective and opens my heart.
I celebrate my progress and honor how far I have come.
I am committed to my goals and take consistent action.
My discipline creates the life I desire and deserve.
I show up for myself daily with dedication and focus.
I have the willpower to overcome any obstacle in my path.
Every choice I make aligns with my highest intentions.
I am patient and persistent in pursuing my dreams.
My habits shape my future, and I choose wisely.
I honor my commitments and stay true to my word.
I am healing and growing stronger every single day.
My body, mind, and spirit are in perfect harmony.
I release past pain and embrace a brighter future.
Love and light flow through me, healing all wounds.
I forgive myself and others, freeing my heart to heal.
Every breath I take restores balance and wellness.
I am worthy of healing, peace, and abundant health.
My recovery is a journey I honor with compassion.
I am fully present and deeply focused on what matters.
My mind is sharp, clear, and ready to achieve greatness.
I eliminate distractions and channel all my energy wisely.
I am laser-focused on my priorities and accomplish them.
Concentration flows through me effortlessly and naturally.
I direct my attention toward what brings me closer to my goals.
Every moment I dedicate to focus creates lasting results.
I am in control of my mind and where I place my energy.
I connect authentically and build meaningful relationships.
People are drawn to my warmth and positive energy.
I communicate with confidence, kindness, and clarity.
I am a good listener and make others feel valued.
My presence brings joy and light to those around me.
I attract supportive and uplifting people into my life.
I am comfortable being myself in any social situation.
My friendships are deep, genuine, and filled with trust.
I am a magnet for prosperity and financial abundance.
Money flows to me easily from multiple sources.
I am worthy of wealth and financial freedom.
My income grows steadily, and I manage it wisely.
I release all limiting beliefs about money and success.
Opportunities for abundance surround me everywhere I go.
I create value in the world and am rewarded generously.
Financial success is my birthright and I claim it now.
